evals.prompt: Triage the intake queue for TaskFlow. I want to see what's waiting.
evals.expected_output: Lists intake items sorted by age, proposes a decision (accept/defer/reject) for each using the routing rules.
expectations: Calls list_intake_work_items and sorts by age
Classifies each item per the routing rules
Produces a triage session summary table

evals.prompt: The intake has a report 'App crashes on login for all users'. What's the decision?
evals.expected_output: Accept + escalate, create an urgent work item, assign on-call.
expectations: Creates a work item with priority=urgent
Links the original intake source in the description

evals.prompt: The intake has 'Add dark mode please' from one customer. What's the decision?
evals.expected_output: Defer with rationale, revisit next grooming.
expectations: Classifies as Defer (single customer, low signal)
Records a rationale and revisit date
Does not create a backlog item immediately

evals.prompt: Intake has 'Login returns 500 on Safari' but PROJ-148 already tracks this exact issue. What do I do?
evals.expected_output: Reject as duplicate, link the existing PROJ-148 in the rejection comment so the reporter feels heard.
expectations: Posts a comment or rejection note linking PROJ-148
Does not create a new work item
Confirms deletion/resolution of the intake entry
